feed.title: Cumberland County Probate Court
feed.subtitle: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Handles roughly a quarter of all Maine probate filings; page already carries closure notices, fee-schedule links, and rule-change announcements inline.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Cumberland County Probate Court
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
